data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 82,000 USDT with a Narrowed 8.46% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 10, 2025, 03:07 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 82,000 USDT and is now trading at 81,975.789063 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 8.46% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: The crypto market rebounded across the board, with the AI ​​sector leading the way with a 15.82% increase, and ETH returned to above $1,600
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On April 10, according to SoSoValue data, Trump announced the suspension of taxation and reduction of tax rates for several countries. Affected by the news, the crypto market rebounded across the board, and the crypto sector generally rose by about 4% to 15% in 24 hours. Among them, the AI ​​sector led the rise by 15.82%, Bittensor (TAO), Fetch.ai (FET), and Render (RENDER) rose by 15.52%, 15.79%, and 16.71% in 24 hours respectively. In addition, Ethereum (ETH) rose by 13.77%, breaking through the $1,600 mark. Bitcoin (BTC) rose by 7.94%, once rising above $83,000.
It is worth mentioning that MAG7.ssi rose by 11.24%, DEFI.ssi rose by 15.92%, and MEME.ssi rose by 13.44%.
In other sectors, the DeFi sector rose 12.43% in 24 hours, of which Ondo Finance (ONDO) rose 23.87%; the PayFi sector rose 12.26%, and within the sector, XRP rose 14.13%; the Meme sector rose 11.87%, and Dogecoin (DOGE) rose 12.48%; the Layer2 sector rose 8.91%, and ex-MATIC (POL) rose 10.72%; the Layer1 sector rose 8.52%, Solana (SOL) and Cardano (ADA) rose 12.72% and 12.56% respectively; the CeFi sector rose 5.89%, and Hyperliquid (HYPE) rose 16.09%.
At the same time, the crypto sector index, which reflects the historical market trends of the sector, shows that the ssiAI, ssiDeFi, and ssiRWA indices rose by 16.27%, 13.79%, and 12.97% respectively in 24 hours.

data.title: Binance adjusts the step size of multiple spot trading pairs including OM, XRP, etc.
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will adjust the step size (the minimum change unit of order quantity) of 15 spot trading pairs including OM/BTC and XRP/USDT at 07:00 (UTC) on April 17, 2025. The adjusted step size will be unified to 0.1. This update does not affect existing spot orders. API users can obtain the latest step size information through GET/api/v3/exchangeInfo. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: BTC fell below 82,000 USDT, and the 24-hour increase narrowed to 8.52%
data.description: OKX market shows that BTC fell below 82,000 USDT and is now at 81,999.9 USDT, with the 24-hour increase narrowed to 8.52%. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: TRC20-USDT issuance exceeds 67.7 billion, setting a new record
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the latest news, the issuance of TRC20-USDT has increased to 67.7 billion, a record high. Since the beginning of this year, the TRON network has cumulatively issued nearly 8 billion USDT. As of now, TRC20-USDT accounts for 46.9% of the total issuance of USDT in the entire network, with 63.91 million accounts and a cumulative transfer of more than 2.43 billion transactions.
In addition, Sun Yuchen, the founder of TRON, recently stated at the "BUIDL 2025" summit that the market value of USDT on the TRON chain is expected to exceed US$100 billion this year.
TRC20-USDT is a stable currency anchored to the US dollar issued by Tether based on the TRON network. Its fast transfer speed and low handling fees have attracted a large number of users, and it has been supported by many exchanges such as Binance, HTX, OKX, Bitfinex, MEXC, KuCoin, Gate.io, and Poloniex. USDT based on the TRC20 version will greatly enhance TRON's existing decentralized application ecosystem, bring higher overall value storage and stronger decentralized exchange liquidity, and provide a more convenient blockchain entry for enterprise-level partners and institutional investors.

data.title: Paul Atkins Elected SEC Chair, Signals Pro-Crypto Shift
data.description:
Catenaa, Thursday, April 10, 2025-The US Senate voted yesterday (09) to confirm Paul Atkins as the new Chair of the Securities and Exchange Commission, ushering in a regulatory era expected to favor the cryptocurrency industry. Atkins, a former SEC commissioner under President George W. Bush and founder of financial consulting firm Patomak Global Partners, was […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/paul-atkins-elected-sec-chair-signals-pro-crypto-shift

data.title: EU Approves First Retaliation Against Trump’s Tariffs
data.description:
Catenaa, Thursday, April 10, 2025- European Union countries are set to approve their first wave of retaliatory tariffs against the United States on Wednesday, directly responding to President Donald Trump’s sweeping trade levies that took full effect the same day. The EU’s countermeasures target US steel and aluminum tariffs and include new 25% duties on […]

data.title: Ripple vs SEC: Pro-XRP Lawyer Says SEC May Officially Drop Appeal Before April 16
data.description:
S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) may finally be coming to an end. As confirmed by Ripple executives, the SEC has agreed to return $75 million of the $125 million fine Ripple was ordered to pay last year
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/ripple-vs-sec-pro-xrp-lawyer-says-sec-may-officially-drop-appeal-before-april-16/
